concept: Create a fighting game where characters can temporarily swap their limbs with opponents after successful grabs, stealing their special moves in the process. Combat revolves around strategically targeting specific limbs to capture particular abilities while protecting your own most valuable appendages. The fighting arena contains neutral robot parts that can also be incorporated for temporary ability boosts. Characters gradually return to their original configuration over time unless limb swaps are maintained through continued successful exchanges. The tournament is hosted by a mad scientist studying fighting style adaptation through their bizarre limb-swapping technology.
